title: Red card system in disarray over Trump, Fifa and Balogun decision
summary: The controversial suspension of Folarin Balogun's red card has created confusion about FIFA's disciplinary protocols and decision-making consistency. The decision leaves significant questions about the coherence of the red card system at the tournament.
content: The decision to effectively overturn the red card shown to United States forward Folarin Balogun leaves many unanswered questions.

zh.title: 特朗普、国际足联和巴洛贡决定导致红牌系统陷入混乱
zh.summary: 福拉林·巴洛贡红牌的有争议暂停引发了对国际足联纪律协议和决策一致性的困惑。这个决定引发了人们对锦标赛中红牌系统连贯性的重大疑问。

title: Queiroz leaves Ghana following World Cup exit
summary: Ghana head coach Carlos Queiroz resigned following the nation's World Cup elimination after only three months in the position. The brief tenure underscores the challenges facing Ghana's football program.
content: Carlos Queiroz steps down as Ghana head coach after three months in charge following their World Cup exit.

zh.title: 克瑞兹在加纳世界杯出局后离职
zh.summary: 加纳主教练卡洛斯·克瑞兹在该国世界杯被淘汰后辞职，仅任职三个月。短暂的任期凸显了加纳足球项目面临的挑战。

title: Haaland sends Norway into quarter-finals as Brazil crash out
summary: Norway defeated Brazil 2-1 with Erling Haaland scoring twice, securing the nation's first-ever World Cup quarter-final appearance. Brazil's loss marks a shocking exit for the five-time champions.
content: Erling Haaland scores twice for Norway as they beat Brazil 2-1 at the New York New Jersey Stadium to reach the quarter-finals of the World Cup for the first time.

zh.title: 哈兰德将挪威送入四分之一决赛，巴西出局
zh.summary: 挪威以2-1击败巴西，埃林·哈兰德打进两球，使该国首次闯入世界杯四分之一决赛。五次冠军巴西的失利标志着一次令人震惊的出局。

title: Haaland double fires Norway into World Cup quarter-finals
summary: Erling Haaland's two-goal performance eliminated five-time World Cup champions Brazil and propelled Norway into the quarter-finals for the first time. The upset victory marks a remarkable achievement for the Norwegian side.
content: Erling Haaland scores twice as Norway knock out five-time champions Brazil, and progress to the quarter-finals of the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 哈兰德梅开二度将挪威送入世界杯四分之一决赛
zh.summary: 埃林·哈兰德的两球表现淘汰了五次世界杯冠军巴西，将挪威首次推进四分之一决赛。这场爆冷胜利标志着挪威队的非凡成就。

title: Real Madrid plot £188m Olise deal - Monday's gossip
summary: Real Madrid is reportedly pursuing Michael Olise in a substantial transfer deal, while Tottenham and Newcastle are exploring moves for Rafael Leao and Angelo Stiller respectively. The weekend's transfer gossip reflects major European clubs' strategic activity in the market.
content: Real Madrid are preparing a mammoth deal for Michael Olise, Tottenham exploring move for Rafael Leao, while Newcastle target Angelo Stiller, plus more.

zh.title: 皇马计划1.88亿英镑奥利塞交易 - 周一转会传闻
zh.summary: 皇马据报正在追求迈克尔·奥利塞的重大转会交易，而热刺和纽卡斯尔分别在探索引进拉斐尔·莱奥和安吉洛·施蒂勒的可能性。周末的转会传闻反映了欧洲顶级俱乐部在市场上的战略活动。

title: Trump thanks Fifa after USA striker Balogun's ban suspended
summary: Folarin Balogun's one-game World Cup ban has been suspended by FIFA, allowing the USA striker to play in their last-16 tie against Belgium. This clears a key player for a critical knockout match where depth could prove decisive.
content: Folarin Balogun is available to play for the United States in their World Cup last-16 tie against Belgium after his one-game ban is suspended by Fifa.

title: Chelsea's Santos considered as Man Utd look to solve midfield issues

summary: Mexico fans' attempt to disrupt England's preparations by setting off fireworks outside their hotel proved ineffective. The tactic failed to unsettle the England squad before their World Cup last-16 match.

title: A key USMNT World Cup perk: An embedded barber, wh...

zh.summary: 世界杯继续进行，巴西对阵挪威、英格兰对阵墨西哥的比赛，报道提供实时更新和分析。墨西哥球迷在英格兰对阵中积极支持他们的球队。

title: England have struggled against low block - could they use it to beat Mexico?

title: Real Madrid sign defender Dumfries from Inter Milan

content: Real Madrid sign Netherlands full-back Denzel Dumfries from Inter Milan on a four-year deal.

title: England fighting history as well as Mexican nation in Azteca cauldron
summary: England faces a challenging World Cup last-16 matchup against Mexico at the historic Azteca Stadium, where the team must overcome both a hostile atmosphere and Mexico's historical venue advantage. BBC chief football writer Phil McNulty analyzes the difficult context facing the English team.
content: England will be battling against history as well as entire nation when the face Mexico in the World Cup last 16 at The Azteca, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

zh.title: 英格兰在阿兹特克大门前既要对抗历史，也要对抗墨西哥

title: Brentford set to sign Burnley forward Anthony

zh.summary: 曼城的埃尔林·哈兰德和阿森纳后卫加布里埃尔之间的英超对手关系即将升级到全球舞台，因为他们各自代表的国家挪威和巴西将在世界杯比赛中对阵。国内紧张局势转向国际竞技场。

zh.summary: 2026年世界杯在美国、加拿大和墨西哥之间进行的独特三国联合主办安排为每个东道国创造了不同的体验。ESPN的马克·奥格登探讨了这项赛事在各国的不同发展情况。

title: Mexico return luxury watches gifted by YouTuber
summary: Mexico returns luxury watches gifted by a content creator because FIFA regulations strictly prohibit expensive gifts to national teams during international competitions.
content: World Cup co-hosts Mexico - who play England on Sunday night - return luxury watches gifted to them by a content creator because Fifa rules prohibit expensive gifts.

title: The Norway story - 28-year wait for their biggest-ever party
summary: Norway returns to the World Cup for the first time in 28 years and faces Brazil in the knockout stage with hopes of reaching the quarter-finals in their history.
content: Norway have waited 28 years for an appearance at the World Cup - now they face Brazil hoping to make history by reaching the quarter-finals for the first time.

zh.summary: 挪威时隔28年重返世界杯，在淘汰赛中面对巴西，希望创造历史进入四分之一决赛。

title: France's Mbappé calls Paraguay tactics 'ugly'
summary: Kylian Mbappé warned that France are prepared to adopt physical, aggressive tactics after Paraguay's provocation in their 1-0 World Cup round-of-16 victory. The forward's comments suggest France will not be intimidated by similar tactics from future opponents.
content: Kylian Mbappé warned future World Cup opponents that France are ready to "play ugly" and get their "hands dirty" after brushing off Paraguay's provocations in a heated 1-0 round of 16 victory,

zh.title: 法国姆巴佩称巴拉圭战术"丑陋"
zh.summary: 基利安·姆巴佩警告说，在巴拉圭在世界杯16强比赛中挑衅之后，法国已准备好采取身体对抗的、积极的战术。这位前锋的评论表明法国不会被未来对手的类似战术所吓倒。

title: Mbappé scores penalty, France beat Paraguay at WC
summary: Kylian Mbappé converted a penalty kick to secure France's 1-0 victory over Paraguay in the World Cup round of 16 in Philadelphia on Saturday. The goal advanced France to the quarterfinals.
content: Kylian Mbappé scored the only goal from the penalty spot as France defeated Paraguay 1-0 in the World Cup round of 16 in Philadelphia on Saturday.

zh.title: 姆巴佩点球破门，法国在世界杯上击败巴拉圭

title: Tuchel urges England to avoid stress in Mexico
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel encouraged his players to remain mentally composed ahead of their World Cup round-of-16 match against Mexico despite recent media scrutiny. Tuchel emphasized emotional control as crucial to the upcoming challenge.
content: Thomas Tuchel has told his England players "not to lose their heads" despite a turbulent build-up to their World Cup round-of-16 clash against Mexico.

zh.title: 图赫尔敦促英格兰在墨西哥避免压力

title: Ounahi brace for Morocco eliminates Canada
summary: Azzedine Ounahi scored twice in the second half as Morocco defeated Canada 3-0 in the World Cup round of 16. Morocco became the first nation to secure a quarterfinal spot in the tournament.
content: A second-half brace from Azzedine Ounahi and a third from Soufiane Rahimi saw Morocco become the first nation to make the quarterfinals of the World Cup with a 3-0 win over co-hosts Canada.

zh.title: 乌纳希梅开二度，摩洛哥淘汰加拿大
zh.summary: 阿扎迪内·乌纳希在下半场连进两球，摩洛哥在世界杯十六强比赛中3:0击败加拿大。摩洛哥成为首支确保进入四分之一决赛的国家。

title: Aguirre ignores Mexico's Azteca altitude advantage...
summary: Mexico manager Javier Aguirre dismissed claims that the high-altitude Azteca stadium and home-crowd support provide an advantage ahead of Sunday's round-of-16 match against England. Aguirre's comments downplay external factors ahead of the fixture.
content: Mexico manager Javier Aguirre is dismissing talk of an altitude or crowd advantage at the Azteca ahead of Sunday's World Cup round-of-16 match against England.

zh.title: 阿基雷无视墨西哥阿兹特克体育场的海拔优势

title: Brazil deny 'anti-Haaland plan' for World Cup tie
summary: Brazil coach Carlo Ancelotti denied reports that his team is developing specific defensive tactics to neutralize Erling Haaland in their World Cup match against Norway. Ancelotti indicated Brazil will approach the challenge without special preparations.
content: Brazil coach Carlo Ancelotti maintains he is not about to set up an "anti Erling Haaland plan" against Norway at the World Cup.

zh.title: 巴西否认为世界杯比赛制定"反哈兰德计划"
zh.summary: 巴西主教练卡洛·安切洛蒂否认了他的球队正在为与挪威的世界杯比赛中制定特定防守战术来遏制埃林·哈兰德的报道。安切洛蒂表示巴西将无需特殊准备就能应对这一挑战。

title: Ream: USMNT a 'true representation of America'
summary: USMNT defender Tim Ream highlighted the diverse backgrounds of players on the U.S. national team as a reflection of America's diversity and cultural values. Ream's comments underscore the national team's role as cultural representatives at the World Cup.
content: USMNT defender Tim Ream said the diverse background of the players on the USMNT is "a true representation of what America is."

zh.title: 里姆：美国男足是"美国的真实代表"
zh.summary: 美国男足后卫蒂姆·里姆强调了美国国家队球员多样化背景是美国多元性和文化价值观的反映。里姆的评论强调了国家队在世界杯上作为文化代表的角色。

title: Marsch on Canada exit: We were the better team
summary: Canada manager Jesse Marsch contended that his team performed better than Morocco despite losing 3-0 in their World Cup round-of-16 match on Saturday. Marsch's assertion suggests the scoreline did not reflect the teams' relative quality.
content: Canada coach Jesse Marsch insisted that his side were "the better team" in their 3-0 World Cup defeat to Morocco on Saturday, saying "I'd rather be us than them."

zh.title: 马尔施谈加拿大出局：我们是更好的球队
zh.summary: 加拿大主教练杰西·马尔施声称他的球队表现优于摩洛哥，尽管在周六的世界杯16强比赛中以0:3失利。马尔施的说法表明比分未能反映两队的相对实力。

title: Tuchel praises respectful Mexico fans amid increased security
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel downplays security concerns ahead of the Mexico match, praising the treatment and respect shown by local fans.
content: Thomas Tuchel dismisses concerns over England's treatment in Mexico, saying it has been "nicer than I expected" and that home fans are "friendly and respectful".

zh.title: 图赫尔在加强安保中表扬尊重的墨西哥球迷
zh.summary: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图赫尔在墨西哥比赛前淡化安全问题，表扬当地球迷表现出的尊重和待遇。

title: France survive Paraguay's 'disgraceful' and 'embarrassing' dark arts
summary: France advanced past Paraguay in their World Cup round of 16 despite facing aggressive, unsporting tactics that drew criticism from observers. The match tested France's composure in ways earlier opponents had not.
content: After dismantling all before them at this World Cup, France had to find a new way to win against a Paraguay side whose use of the dark arts angered many of those watching.

zh.title: 法国战胜巴拉圭的"不光彩"和"令人尴尬"的龌龊战术
zh.summary: 法国在世界杯16强中战胜巴拉圭，尽管面临了激进的、不体育精神的战术，这引起了观察者的批评。这场比赛以前所未有的方式考验了法国的心理素质。

title: France pass toughest World Cup test yet in beating...
summary: France faced their most challenging World Cup match as Paraguay tested them in Philadelphia's heat, but Mbappé and teammates navigated the difficulties to advance to the quarterfinals. The victory demonstrated France's ability to overcome both tactical challenges and adverse conditions.
content: France haven't really been challenged yet at this World Cup in the way Paraguay tested them Sunday, but Mbappe & Co. were able to stay cool in the sweltering heat and advance to the quarterfinals.

zh.title: 法国通过最艰难的世界杯考验战胜对手
zh.summary: 法国在费城炎热的天气中面临了他们最具挑战性的世界杯比赛，巴拉圭给予严峻考验，但姆巴佩和队友克服了困难，晋级八强。这场胜利展示了法国克服战术挑战和恶劣条件的能力。

title: France overcome resolute Paraguay to reach quarter-final
summary: France secured their quarterfinal berth after Kylian Mbappé's second-half penalty defeated a determined Paraguay side in Philadelphia. The victory marks World Cup favorites France's progression despite facing stiff resistance.
content: World Cup favourites France book their quarter-final place thanks to Kylian Mbappe's second-half penalty against a stubborn Paraguay side in Philadelphia.

zh.title: 法国战胜坚韧的巴拉圭晋级八强
zh.summary: 基利安·姆巴佩在下半场的点球在费城击败了顽强的巴拉圭，法国确保了他们的八强席位。这场胜利标志着世界杯夺冠热门法国的晋级，尽管他们面临了激烈的抵抗。

title: Mexico could bring the best out of  Tuchel's England
summary: BBC Sport analysts including Thomas Hitzlsperger, Joe Hart, and Micah Richards believe Mexico's playing style could inspire England to perform at their highest level under Thomas Tuchel. The pundits view Mexico as a potential catalyst for England to showcase their strengths.
content: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger, Joe Hart and Micah Richards feel the way Mexico play could bring out the best of Thomas Tuchel's England side.

zh.title: 墨西哥可能激发图赫尔执教的英格兰展现最佳水平
zh.summary: 包括托马斯·希茨尔斯佩格、乔·哈特和米卡·理查兹在内的BBC体育分析师认为，墨西哥的比赛风格可能会激励英格兰在托马斯·图赫尔的执教下展现最高水平。评论员认为墨西哥可能是英格兰展现其优势的催化剂。
